---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero-section">
  <p class="hero-eyebrow">Data Visualization Portfolio</p>
  <h1 class="hero-title">
    The Plots<br><em>Thicken</em>
  </h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">
    Plotting everyday drama and data
  </p>
  <a href="plots/index.html" class="hero-cta">View the plots</a>
</section>

<section style="padding: 5rem 4rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;">
  <p class="section-label">What's here</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">The collection</h2>

  <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 1px; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(194,80,122,0.12);">

    <a href="plots/index.html" style="text-decoration:none; display:block; padding: 2.5rem 2rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fce8f3, #ede8ff, #e8f0ff); border-radius: 16px; transition: box-shadow 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.boxShadow='0 8px 32px rgba(194,80,122,0.2)'" onmouseout="this.style.boxShadow='none'">
      <div style="font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(194,80,122,0.6); margin-bottom: 0.75rem;">01</div>
      <div style="font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-size: 1.5rem; color: #3d2645; margin-bottom: 0.75rem;">Plots</div>
      <div style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: rgba(61,38,69,0.5); line-height: 1.7;">All the plots — browse the full collection.</div>
    </a>

  </div>
</section>

<section style="padding: 0 4rem 5rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;">
  <p class="section-label">Favorites</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Featured plots</h2>

  <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 1rem;">

    <a href="plots/summerhouse/index.html" style="text-decoration: none; display: block; padding: 1.75rem; border: 1px solid rgba(194,80,122,0.2); border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(252,232,243,0.05), rgba(237,232,255,0.05)); transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='rgba(194,80,122,0.5)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 4px 20px rgba(194,80,122,0.12)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(194,80,122,0.2)'; this.style.boxShadow='none'">
      <p style="font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(194,80,122,0.6); margin-bottom: 0.6rem;">BravoTV · Drama</p>
      <p style="font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-size: 1.2rem; color: #3d2645; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Summer House Scandal</p>
      <p style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: rgba(61,38,69,0.5); margin: 0;">A dramatic look at the data behind the drama.</p>
    </a>

    <a href="plots/gbbo/02-GBBO-ages-per-episode.html" style="text-decoration: none; display: block; padding: 1.75rem; border: 1px solid rgba(194,80,122,0.2); border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(252,232,243,0.05), rgba(237,232,255,0.05)); transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='rgba(194,80,122,0.5)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 4px 20px rgba(194,80,122,0.12)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(194,80,122,0.2)'; this.style.boxShadow='none'">
      <p style="font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(194,80,122,0.6); margin-bottom: 0.6rem;">GBBO · ggplot2</p>
      <p style="font-family: 'DM Serif Display', serif; font-size: 1.2rem; color: #3d2645; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Baker Ages in Each Episode</p>
      <p style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: rgba(61,38,69,0.5); margin: 0;">Tracking how age plays out across the tent.</p>
    </a>

  </div>
</section>
```
